title: Property Management Platform
rl: reduction in manual operations across the portfolio
overview: A regional property manager was running a 300+ unit portfolio on spreadsheets and disconnected tools.
challenge: Leasing, maintenance, and rent tracking lived in separate spreadsheets and inboxes. Nothing was real-time, and the team lost hours every week reconciling data by hand.
built: A unified dashboard for units, tenants, and leases
Automated rent reminders and payment tracking
A maintenance request portal for tenants
quote: We replaced four tools and a mountain of spreadsheets with one platform. Our team got their week back.

title: AI Customer Support Agent
rl: faster response times with an AI-first support flow
overview: A growing SaaS company's support queue was outpacing its small team.
challenge: Response times climbed as ticket volume grew, and hiring couldn't keep pace. Customers waited hours for answers already buried in the docs.
built: An AI agent trained on their docs and past tickets (RAG)
Automatic draft replies for agents to approve
A feedback loop that improves answers over time
quote: It handles the repetitive 80% instantly, so our humans focus on the cases that actually need them.

title: Logistics Operations Dashboard
overview: A logistics operator needed live visibility across a fragmented operation.
challenge: Dispatch, fleet status, and delivery data were scattered across systems, making it impossible to spot bottlenecks until it was too late.
built: Performance analytics by route and driver
quote: For the first time we can see the whole operation at a glance — and act before small issues become big ones.

title: Healthcare Booking Platform
rl: appointment growth within the first quarter
overview: A multi-location clinic relied on phone bookings and a clunky calendar.
challenge: Patients struggled to book outside office hours, no-shows were high, and front-desk staff spent the day on the phone.
built: A simple admin view for the front desk
quote: Bookings tripled and no-shows dropped — patients love booking on their phone at midnight.

title: SaaS Analytics Platform
rl: faster customer onboarding after the rebuild
overview: A fintech product's legacy analytics were slow and hard to onboard customers into.
challenge: New customers took days to get value from clunky, slow reports, hurting activation and retention.
quote: Onboarding that took days now takes hours. Activation went up almost immediately.

title: Marketplace for Tradespeople
rl: bookings processed in the first 90 days
overview: A startup wanted to connect homeowners with vetted local tradespeople.
challenge: They needed a trusted two-sided marketplace — discovery, booking, payments, and reviews — launched fast enough to capture demand.
quote: We hit ten thousand bookings in our first quarter — the platform scaled with us from day one.

title: Internal Operations CRM
rl: tools replaced by one unified internal system
overview: An SMB ran its entire operation across a dozen disconnected apps.
challenge: Data was duplicated across twelve tools, nothing synced, and onboarding new staff was painful.
built: A custom internal CRM and ops hub
quote: One system replaced twelve. Everyone finally works from the same source of truth.

title: AI Workflow Automation
rl: hours saved every month through automation
overview: An enterprise team spent thousands of hours a month on repetitive manual processes.
challenge: Critical workflows depended on manual data entry and copy-paste between systems — slow, error-prone, and impossible to scale.
quote: We gave a thousand hours a month back to the team — and cut errors at the same time.
